data.title: What's Going On With TeraWulf Stock Tuesday?
data.description:
TeraWulf Inc. (NASDAQ:WULF) stock rose Tuesday, reflecting a strong performance in the market. The move comes as the broader market experiences mixed results, with the S&P 500 up 0.51% and the Nasdaq gaining 0.95%, while the Dow Jones is down 0.61%.

The Catalyst

The stock’s upward momentum appears to be driven by overall market trends rather than specific company news. TeraWulf’s shares are benefiting from the positive sentiment in the technology sector.

Despite the positive market backdrop, the stock’s performance is noteworthy as it reflects a significant 8.34% increase during regular trading hours.

TeraWulf has recently been in the spotlight as its shift from pure Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC/USD) mining toward high-performance computing and AI services attracts fresh attention to the stock’s growth story.

Technical Analysis

Currently, TeraWulf is trading 13.7% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 15.4% above its 100-day SMA, indicating a strong short-term and longer-term trend. Over the past 12 months, shares have skyrocketed by 234.54%, and the stock is positioned closer to its 52-week highs than lows, suggesting robust upward momentum.

The RSI is at 53.39, which is considered neutral territory, while the MACD is above its signal line, indicating bullish momentum. This combination of a neutral RSI and a bullish MACD suggests mixed momentum, reflecting a healthy interest in the stock.

TeraWulf’s technical setup shows a strong performance over the past year, with the stock benefiting from a significant golden cross that occurred in August, where the 50-day SMA crossed above the 200-day SMA. This bullish signal indicates a potential continuation of the uptrend, and traders will be watching closely for any tests of the resistance level at $16.50.

Company Context

TeraWulf Inc. is a digital asset technology company that is engaged in digital infrastructure and sustainable energy development. It is involved in supporting environmentally conscious bitcoin mining operations by developing and operating facilities within the United States. The company’s Bitcoin mining facilities are powered by clean, affordable, and reliable energy sources.

Earnings & Analyst Outlook

Investors are looking ahead to the next earnings report on Feb. 27.

  • EPS Estimate: Loss of 15 cents (Down from Loss of 8 cents YoY)
  • Revenue Estimate: $43.95 million (Up from $34.98 million YoY)

Analyst Consensus & Recent Actions: The stock carries a Buy Rating with an average price target of $14.04. Recent analyst moves include:

  • Keefe, Bruyette & Woods: Upgraded to Outperform (Raises Target to $24.00) (Dec. 31, 2025)
  • Cantor Fitzgerald: Overweight (Maintains Target to $18.00) (Dec. 23, 2025)
  • B. Riley Securities: Buy (Raises Target to $23.00) (Nov. 12, 2025)

Benzinga Edge Rankings

Below is the Benzinga Edge scorecard for TeraWulf, highlighting its strengths and weaknesses compared to the broader market:

  • Momentum: Bullish (Score: 98.27) — Stock is outperforming the broader market.

The Verdict: TeraWulf’s Benzinga Edge signal reveals a strong momentum score, indicating that the stock is currently outperforming the market. This bullish momentum suggests that traders may want to consider entering positions, especially as the stock approaches key resistance levels.

Price Action

WULF Price Action: TeraWulf shares were up 8.34% at $14.94 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

data.title: GameStop Stock Sees Increased Activity: What's Going On?
data.description:
GameStop Corp (NYSE:GME) shares are trending on Tuesday after Michael Burry revealed he has been buying the stock, boosting investor confidence.

  • GameStop shares are bouncing around. Where is GME stock headed?

Purchases Igniting Renewed Investor Confidence

Michael Burry wrote in a Substack post this week that he has been accumulating GameStop shares again.

"I own GME. I have been buying recently," Burry said, explaining that he believes the stock is trading near one‑times tangible book value and pointing to CEO Ryan Cohen's long‑term capital strategy.

Additionally, a new SEC filing also showed that board member Lawrence Cheng purchased 5,000 shares on Jan. 26 for about $114,000, which is a relatively small buy, but one that adds to the broader theme of insider accumulation given Cohen's own buying spree last week.

Cohen’s Recent Buying

Nearly 12 million shares of GameStop stock have been traded on Tuesday, well above the average of 6.6 million, according to Benzinga Pro. The increased activity reflects renewed enthusiasm around Cohen's own buying activity. Last week, he picked up one million shares at just over $21 apiece, bringing his stake to roughly 42.1 million shares, or about 9.3% of the company.

GameStop also recently approved a compensation plan that could award Cohen options on up to 171.5 million additional shares if the company hits aggressive long‑term targets.

It’s worth noting that Burry was one of the earliest well‑known investors to back GameStop's turnaround in 2019, urging the company to repurchase shares, reduce debt and streamline operations, which helped shape the early bull case long before the meme‑stock frenzy of 2021.

Is The Rally Sustainable Or Just A Fad?

GameStop is currently trading 12.2% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 4.7% above its 100-day SMA, indicating some short-term strength. However, it is 0.8% below its 200-day SMA, suggesting that the longer-term trend may be under pressure. Over the past 12 months, shares have decreased by 11.53%, and they are currently positioned closer to their 52-week highs than lows.

The RSI is at 71.43, indicating that the stock is in overbought territory, which could signal a potential pullback. Meanwhile, the MACD is above the signal line, suggesting bullish momentum despite the overbought condition.

The combination of overbought RSI and bullish MACD indicates mixed momentum, suggesting that while there is some strength, caution may be warranted due to the overbought condition.

  • Key Resistance: $24.50
  • Key Support: $22.00

GME Price Action: GameStop shares were up 0.79% at $24.21 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro.

Image: Shutterstock

data.title: CoreWeave Stock Soars Following Expanded Nvidia Collaboration
data.description:
CoreWeave Inc (NASDAQ:CRWV) is trading higher on Tuesday after Deutsche Bank upgraded the stock from Hold to Buy and lifted its price target from $100 to $140.

  • CoreWeave stock is surging to new heights today. Why is CRWV stock up today?

Deutsche Bank’s Upgrade Sparks Market Confidence

Analyst Brad Zelnick said the upgrade reflects growing confidence in CoreWeave's long‑term trajectory, especially after NVIDIA Corp (NASDAQ:NVDA) revealed an expanded $2 billion investment on Monday, CNBC reported.

That funding is expected to help CoreWeave accelerate its plan to build out 5 gigawatts of AI infrastructure by 2030, a move Zelnick believes further validates the company's technical edge. His new price target suggests significant upside from current levels.

Zelnick added that demand for AI compute continues to outpace new supply, and CoreWeave's strong GPU economics and asset quality make the stock more compelling at today's valuation.

He also noted that Nvidia's deeper involvement could increase the likelihood that CoreWeave's SUNK and Mission Control software becomes part of Nvidia's reference architectures, opening the door to a "sizeable, high‑margin" hybrid and multi‑cloud software opportunity.

With CoreWeave's valuation back “to very reasonable levels," Zelnick said he's taking a bullish stance ahead of the company's upcoming earnings report.

Adding to the positive sentiment, Mizuho's Gregg Moskowitz reiterated a Neutral rating but raised his price target from $92 to $100, which is likely contributing to the stock's upward momentum.

CoreWeave Trades Above Key Levels

CoreWeave is currently trading 29.7% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 8.1% above its 100-day SMA, demonstrating strong short-term strength. Over the past 12 months, shares have increased by 175.84% and are positioned closer to their 52-week highs than lows, indicating a robust long-term trend.

The RSI is at 61.57, which is considered neutral territory, while the MACD is above its signal line, indicating bullish momentum. This combination suggests that the stock is not overbought and is showing signs of strength.

  • Key Support: $101.00

CRWV Price Action: CoreWeave shares were up 13.21% at $111.30 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro.

Image: Shutterstock

data.title: What's Going On With Maplebear Stock Tuesday?
data.description:
Maplebear Inc. (NASDAQ:CART), which operates as Instacart, saw its stock fall on Tuesday as Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) expanded its grocery delivery footprint, heightening competitive pressure on Instacart despite the company's newly announced retail technology partnerships.

The stock has faced renewed selling after Amazon said it now offers fast grocery delivery in more than 5,000 U.S. cities and towns, adding that strong customer feedback is driving plans to expand same-day delivery of fresh groceries to more communities in 2026.

On Tuesday, Stifel analyst Mark Kelley reiterated a Buy rating on the stock but cut his price forecast from $49 to $46.

Expanded Retail Tech Partnership

In a separate development, Maplebear announced an expanded omnichannel partnership with Allegiance Retail Services, aimed at strengthening digital capabilities for independent grocers.

The alliance includes Instacart's Storefront Pro enterprise commerce platform, providing modern e-commerce tools for all Allegiance retailers. Instacart is also rolling out its Carrot Ads retail media offering across Allegiance stores to support revenue growth both online and in-store.

Instacart's AI-powered Caper Carts are already in use at select Foodtown supermarkets in New York, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania, with additional deployments planned for 2026.

Unified Loyalty Strategy

Instacart is also integrating with AppCard, Allegiance's loyalty platform, to align promotions, rewards, and coupons across digital and physical shopping. Company officials said the unified loyalty experience is designed to deliver consistent, personalized savings for customers.

CART Price Action: Maplebear shares were down 7.22% at $37.43 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: Why Is Pfizer Stock Rising Tuesday?
data.description:
Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) shares are trading higher on Tuesday, as the stock benefits from a price forecast increase at Cantor Fitzgerald.

The firm raised its forecast to $27 from $24, providing a catalyst for the pharmaceutical giant even as the broader healthcare sector declined 1.6% during the session.

The move stands out against mixed market performance, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.42% and the Nasdaq climbing 0.89%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.01%.

Recent Developments Supporting Pfizer

Pfizer has been active on multiple fronts in recent weeks. The company recently entered a non-exclusive licensing agreement with Novavax Inc. (NASDAQ:NVAX) for its Matrix-M adjuvant technology, which will be utilized in products across two disease areas.

Under the deal, Novavax received a $30 million upfront payment, with potential development and sales milestones totaling up to $500 million, along with tiered royalties.

Additionally, Pfizer sells sunitinib under the brand Sutent, which is being studied in combination with Cogent Biosciences Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:COGT) bezuclastinib for gastrointestinal stromal tumors. The combination recently received Food and Drug Administration Breakthrough Therapy Designation after demonstrating a 50% reduction in disease progression risk.

Leadership Commentary

At the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland last week, Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla addressed vaccine policy and global competition.

Bourla warned that reduced funding for U.S. universities has weakened America’s position in global health research as Chinese institutions now account for roughly 80% of top-tier positions in health research rankings.

Earnings & Analyst Outlook

Investors are looking ahead to the next earnings report on Feb. 3.

  • EPS Estimate: $0.57 (Down from $0.63 YoY)
  • Revenue Estimate: $16.83 billion (Down from $17.76 billion YoY)
  • Valuation: P/E of 15.0x (Indicates fair valuation)

Benzinga Edge Rankings

Below is the Benzinga Edge scorecard for Pfizer, highlighting its strengths and weaknesses compared to the broader market:

  • Value: 34.84 — Trading at a premium relative to peers.
  • Quality: 54.07 — Balance sheet remains healthy.
  • Momentum: 29.54 — Stock is underperforming the broader market.

PFE Price Action: Pfizer shares were up 2.14% at $26.43 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo: Jonathan Weiss / Shutterstock
